checks.name: API occupied-port startup
checks.detail: The post-fix `pnpm dev` repro no longer emits the raw unhandled Node `EADDRINUSE` stack trace from `apps/api/src/index.ts`.

checks.name: API reuse vs conflict UX
checks.detail: Controlled startup proof shows a foreign listener gets an actionable conflict message and an already-running HappyTG API gets an actionable reuse message with `HAPPYTG_API_PORT/PORT` guidance.

checks.name: Targeted regression coverage
checks.detail: Refreshed API tests cover HappyTG reuse, foreign conflict, different-HappyTG-service conflict, and transient handoff retry.

checks.name: Workspace verification
checks.detail: Refreshed `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm build` artifacts all exited 0.

checks.name: Bot warning classification
checks.detail: Standalone bot polling before/after artifacts still show `Telegram polling cycle failed` with `detail:"fetch failed"`, supporting its classification as an independent symptom.

checks.name: Fresh verifier pass
checks.detail: The independent verifier reported no findings in the reviewed change scope after the minimal fixer patch.
